command.name: Set Multiviewer Layout
command.description: Set layout on input PARAM1 to PARAM2

command.name: Set Multiviewer PIP Position
command.description: Set PIP Posistion on input PARAM1 to PARAM2

command.name: Set Multiviewer PIP Size
command.description: Set PIP Size on input PARAM1 to PARAM2

command.name: Set Multiviewer Audio Source
command.description: Set audio source on input PARAM1 to PARAM2
